name: GT-squarehole
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-square-hole-almost-positive (proofs/lem-square-hole-almost-positive/, af: validated; status proved). Imported as a black box; instantiate r:=a. VERBATIM contract: "For r in A the square hole q_r = P(r^2)-r^2 in Ker P satisfies q_r >= -C eta ||r||^2 1, ||P(q_r^2)|| <= C eta ||r||^4, and ||q_r||_omega <= C sqrt(eta) ||r||^2."
